::: {.page-container}

::: {.content-page}

# Contact

For research-related inquiries, collaborations, or speaking invitations, please get in touch.

::: {.contact-card}

**Cornelia Wagner**  
Postdoctoral researcher  
Population Health Laboratory, University of Fribourg, Switzerland

[Email](mailto:cornelia.wagner@unifr.ch){.pub-button}
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=13O0dTkAAAAJ&hl=en){.pub-button}
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9597-3822){.pub-button}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/cornelia-wagner/){.pub-button}

:::

:::

:::
